title: ononis repens subsp. leiosperma
intro: Ononis repens subsp. leiosperma, also known as the lesser burnet or small burnet, is a perennial plant species within the legume family. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. Ononis repens subsp. leiosperma is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating urinary tract problems, and acting as a natural remedy for gastrointestinal issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
